summary: Completed comprehensive Phase 4 testing of GPOS by Grahmos — Institutional Procurement & Work-Learning OS. All backend APIs (102/102 tests) and frontend UI/integration tests passed successfully. Phase 4 NEW features validated: Onboarding (4 role tracks with resumable/persisted progress, Mobbin-grounded value-first design), Admin config (institution profile updates), Supplier Portal (engagements + documents with compliance status). Phase 2/3 regression checks confirmed: SoD enforcement, audit chain integrity, Request Hub, Decision Room lifecycle, approval workflow, state machine, learning loop, Flow Ops all still working correctly.
passed_tests: PHASE 4 BACKEND (10 new tests):
GET /api/onboarding/status - 4 tracks returned (admin, requester, operator, student) each with current_step + completed
POST /api/onboarding (admin track, step 3, save data) - progress saved with data={'outcomes':['Savings','Speed']}
GET /api/onboarding?track=admin - resumed correctly at step 3 with data preserved (resumable, no data loss)
POST /api/onboarding (requester track, complete) - completed=true saved
GET /api/onboarding/status - requester track shows completed=true
POST /api/admin/institution - updated campuses='Main Campus', fiscal_year='FY2027', launch_lanes=['Event Procurement']
GET /api/institution - verified updates reflected
GET /api/supplier/portal?supplier_id=sup_capital - supplier + 1 engagement (Founder Day) + 4 documents (COI/W-9/ServSafe on_file)
GET /api/supplier/portal?supplier_id=sup_metro - COI status 'missing' (as expected)
PHASE 2/3 REGRESSION (92 tests - all passed):
Health check, Institution endpoint, Demo Mode impersonation
Grahmos Today dashboard (KPIs, My Queue, Agent Findings)
Cases & Decision Room (case details, decision, suppliers, EUR quote with fx_source)
SoD enforcement (requester self-approval blocked, wrong approver blocked, correct approver succeeded)
Approval workflow sequence (gates unblock in order, all gates cleared, case auto-transitioned to APPROVED)
Immutable audit chain (19 events verified, chain_valid=true)
State machine transitions (legal transition, idempotent handling, illegal transition blocked)
Offline sync (exception injected, outbox queue, sync applied/deduped/blocked)
Demo controls & exceptions (5 exception types injected successfully)
Learning loop (student tasks, quiz, non-supervisor attestation blocked, supervisor attestation succeeded)
Skills passport (competencies, opportunities, hours)
Request Hub (4 lanes, preview with missing_fields + duplicate_suggestions, incomplete->NEEDS_INFO, complete->TRIAGED)
Meeting consent gate (propose windows, send blocked without consent, send with consent succeeded)
Contract clause matrix (5 clauses with all statuses)
Buy/Make/Repair (3 options with costs)
Order->Logistics lifecycle (order->ORDERED, ship->IN_TRANSIT, receive blocked without checklist, receive->RECEIVED with evidence, close->CLOSED)
Override (validation enforced, override recorded)
Delegation (delegated to u_executive with expiry)
Flow replay (runs incremented, status OK, idempotent)
Offline conflict resolve (conflict resolved with status=APPLIED)
PHASE 4 FRONTEND (all features tested):
Navigation - 'Get Started' and 'Supplier Portal' nav items appear in left rail and route correctly
Onboarding (/onboarding) - 4 track cards visible (admin, requester, operator, student) with progress bars

Onboarding - Student track: clicking 'track-student' opens step wizard, step navigation works (onboarding-next advances, onboarding-back goes back), option selection works (opt-Supplier-research), reaching step 2 confirmed
Onboarding - Admin track: persistence verified (backend saved step 3 with data, frontend resumed at saved step, data retained on reload)
Onboarding - Admin track: 'Institution profile' step has input-campuses / input-fiscal_year fields (tested via backend, frontend inputs present)

Supplier Portal (/supplier-portal) - supplier header (Capital Event Group), engagement card (engagement-case_founderday) with quote status, Required Documents list with statuses (COI/W-9/ServSafe on_file)
REGRESSION (Phase 2/3 features still working):
Grahmos Today - KPI tiles (56 elements), My Queue section visible
Decision Room - Recommendation panel visible, stage stepper accessible
Request Hub - Event Procurement and IT & SaaS lane cards visible
Approval Center - page loads correctly
Flow Ops - 12 workflow cards visible with replay buttons

success_percentage.backend: 100% (102/102 tests passed - 92 Phase 2/3 regression + 10 Phase 4 new)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all Phase 4 features + Phase 2/3 regression tested successfully)
